# model.network { #raccoon.model.network }

`model.network`

ResNet policy-value network for backgammon.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [RaccoonNet](#raccoon.model.network.RaccoonNet) | ResNet with policy and value heads for backgammon. |
| [ResidualBlock](#raccoon.model.network.ResidualBlock) | Conv3x3 -> BN -> ReLU -> Conv3x3 -> BN -> skip add -> ReLU. |

### RaccoonNet { #raccoon.model.network.RaccoonNet }

```python
model.network.RaccoonNet(
    in_channels=17,
    board_h=2,
    board_w=12,
    num_actions=1352,
    channels=128,
    num_blocks=6,
)
```

ResNet with policy and value heads for backgammon.

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [forward](#raccoon.model.network.RaccoonNet.forward) | Forward pass. |
| [predict](#raccoon.model.network.RaccoonNet.predict) | Single-position inference for MCTS. |
| [predict_batch](#raccoon.model.network.RaccoonNet.predict_batch) | Batched inference for multiple positions. |

##### forward { #raccoon.model.network.RaccoonNet.forward }

```python
model.network.RaccoonNet.forward(x)
```

Forward pass.

Args:
    x: (batch, 16, 2, 12)

Returns:
    policy_logits: (batch, 1352) raw logits (not masked)
    value: (batch, 1) in [-1, 1]

##### predict { #raccoon.model.network.RaccoonNet.predict }

```python
model.network.RaccoonNet.predict(obs, legal_actions)
```

Single-position inference for MCTS.

Args:
    obs: (17, 2, 12) numpy array
    legal_actions: list of valid action indices

Returns:
    policy: dict mapping action -> probability (sums to ~1, only legal)
    value: scalar float in [-1, 1]

##### predict_batch { #raccoon.model.network.RaccoonNet.predict_batch }

```python
model.network.RaccoonNet.predict_batch(obs_list, legal_actions_list)
```

Batched inference for multiple positions.

Args:
    obs_list: list of (17, 2, 12) numpy arrays
    legal_actions_list: list of legal action lists

Returns:
    list of (policy_dict, value) tuples

### ResidualBlock { #raccoon.model.network.ResidualBlock }

```python
model.network.ResidualBlock(channels)
```

Conv3x3 -> BN -> ReLU -> Conv3x3 -> BN -> skip add -> ReLU.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [load_model](#raccoon.model.network.load_model) | Create a RaccoonNet from a checkpoint, using its saved config. |

### load_model { #raccoon.model.network.load_model }

```python
model.network.load_model(path)
```

Create a RaccoonNet from a checkpoint, using its saved config.

Falls back to default config for older checkpoints without config.
